description_long: This rifle features a futuristic, tactical design with a predominantly black and dark green color scheme accented by small red and blue highlights. The body is robust and angular, with a bullpup configuration that places the magazine and action behind the trigger for a compact profile. The rifle includes a prominent top rail for mounting optics, and the stock is integrated into the main body, providing a streamlined appearance. The barrel is short and thick, ending in a distinctive muzzle device that appears to be a flash hider. Various mechanical details, such as buttons, levers, and textured grip areas, are visible along the sides, suggesting multiple interactive components. The overall construction suggests a mix of metal and polymer materials, typical of modern tactical firearms.
description: A compact, futuristic bullpup rifle with a black and dark green finish, featuring a short barrel, integrated stock, and multiple mechanical details.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full profile, including the bullpup layout, integrated stock, and detailed mechanical features.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the short, thick barrel and muzzle device, with minimal visible detail on the body.
description_view_2: Opposite side view, mirroring the main profile and showing similar mechanical and design features as view 0.
description_view_3: Rear view displaying the back of the integrated stock and the compact width of the rifle.
